name: soul-multiverse
description: One Cosmos → Infinite Realities — The Soul Multiverse

scripts.quantum: node -e "const {QuantumSoul} = require('./quantum-soul'); const q = new QuantumSoul(); q.createQuantumSoul({name: 'Test', creating: 0.5});"
scripts.fractal: node -e "const {FractalCode} = require('./fractal-code'); const f = new FractalCode(); f.createFractal({name: 'Test', seed: 'pattern'});"

author: Craig Jones
